name: Peppy Hush Puppies
recipeIngredient: 1 can Whole tomatoes (7-1/2 oz), drained and chopped
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Southern Living
Preparation Time: 0:05
Combine first 8 ingredients; make a well in the center of the mixture. Combine egg and beer; add to dry ingredients, stirring just until moistened. Drop batter by tablespoonfuls into deep hot oil (375 degrees). Fry only a few at a time, turning once, for 3 to 5 minutes or until hush puppies are golden brown. Drain on paper towels. Yield: about 1-1/2 dozen.
